name: THE ASTRAL LANDSCAPES
core_function: Collective unconscious rendered as 3D environment. Architecture of desire and trauma.

visual_profile.appearance: Long-exposure bleeding edges, thought-mist (data fragments), Great Mirror sky (infinite reflection)
visual_profile.lighting: Self-luminous, neon fault-lines, 2D avatars with no backs

necropolis_unfinished.description: Floating scaffolding, half-built spires, cathedrals of translucent blueprints
necropolis_unfinished.function: Repository of abandoned projects and unfulfilled intentions

ghost_web.description: Silicon Mirror - Motherboard continent, fiber-optic city

key_features.attention_spires: Height correlates to web traffic. Google-Spire pierces A5 layer
key_features.avatar_construction: 2D facades with no backs—Instagram filters given depth
key_features.data_glass: Windows show random comment threads/search history

entities.black_pixel_wasps: Bot-farm attacks manifest as swarms stinging specific buildings

synapse_rails.description: Transit system - tubes of compressed A6 thought-mist
synapse_rails.usage: Consciousness compressed to data packet, launched via cannon sensation
synapse_rails.hazard: Packet loss - personality fragments scatter across sectors creating 'Distributed Ghosts'

shell_people.threat: Harmless unless interrupted (shriek like tearing metal)

echo_stalkers.description: Acoustic parasites, capture sounds to lure victims

the_censors.description: Grey flannel suits, no faces, smooth plastic skin

un_people.glitch_born: Born seeing Underlayer (A6 from birth). Deleted by age 5
un_people.chrono_rebels: Operatives who stole Root-Keys. Parents never met, records erased
un_people.deleted_civilizations: Level 4 Ascension without Archon supervision. Now exist as collective 'scream' in A4 Sea

redaction_oil.description: Deleted timelines/events rendered as toxic sludge
redaction_oil.appearance: Black, viscous, floats on A4 Sea surface
redaction_oil.properties: Touch causes temporary causality loss (forgetting important events)
redaction_oil.opportunity: Contains hidden data—'Original Sin' of simulation, names of Un-People
